title: Staged merge of PR #61: companion-mount containment fix reconciled with today's guard changes

hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs (today's HEAD version — carries ce-1's batch-problems rendering and si-era message shapes)

action: Merge PR #61 into main preserving both sides' intent. Steps: (1) git fetch origin; git merge --no-ff --no-commit origin/fix-write-guard-companion-mount — expect conflicts in hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs and .bee/bin/hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs. (2) Resolve: keep HEAD's ce-1 batch-problems rendering and every message shape the hook tests pin, and fold in the PR's companion-mount recognition in the containment check (read the PR diff to lift its logic precisely; if the PR's version of a region predates today's refactor, re-apply its INTENT onto today's code rather than taking its bytes). hooks/test_write_guard.mjs: take the PR's new tests, adapt paths/assertions to today's code if needed. (3) The runtime copy .bee/bin/hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs must end byte-identical to hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs — resolve the source, then sync via node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply. (4) Regen: release_manifest --write, impact_registry --write if registry changes. (5) Semantic gate BEFORE commit: node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check — a red aborts the merge (git merge --abort) and returns [BLOCKED]. (6) Green: commit the merge (message: Merge PR #61 (fix-write-guard-companion-mount) into main [mp61-1]), push origin main, verify gh pr view 61 shows MERGED. Sanity demo after merge: a Write to the session scratchpad path under /tmp/claude-1000/... is no longer denied by the containment check IF that is what the companion-mount fix addresses (check the PR body/diff for the actual mount semantics and demo accordingly, read-only).
